executives.name: Dambisa Moyo
executives.background: Co-principal of Versaca Investments. Director since 2016.

executives.name: Jon McNeill
executives.background: Mr. McNeill has served as a member of the Board since 2021. He is the CEO and co-founder of DVx Ventures and previously served as the COO of Lyft and President of Global Sales, Delivery and Service at Tesla.

executives.name: Kevin Johnson
executives.background: Former President and CEO of Starbucks Corporation.

executives.name: Mellody Hobson
executives.background: Co-CEO and President of Ariel Investments, LLC. Chair of Starbucks Corporation.

executives.name: Satya Nadella
executives.background: Satya Nadella is Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of Microsoft. Before being named CEO in February 2014, Nadella held leadership roles in both enterprise and consumer businesses across the company. Joining Microsoft in 1992, he quickly became known as a leader who could span a breadth of technologies and businesses to transform some of Microsoft’s biggest product offerings.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors

executives.name: Sheryl Sandberg
executives.background: Former Chief Operating Officer of Meta Platforms, Inc.

executives.name: Troy Alstead
executives.background: Troy Alstead has served as a member of our Board since March 2021. Mr. Alstead previously served as Chief Operating Officer of Starbucks Corporation.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Operating Officer (and various senior executive roles including CFO)
